raw_consumer_statement: XXXX XX/XX/year> at XXXXXXXX XXXX in XXXX XXXX ( XXXX ) we took a taxi and verbally agreed to pay {$15.00} for the closest hotel which is 10 minutes ' drive. They said they don't accept cash, so we provided a credit card. They didn't give us any receipts. After returning home we discovered that charge was {$320.00}. We open a dispute with the credit card company, they did an investigation, sent us the copy of transaction with this fraudulent charge and closed the case stating we need to pay.
